holdings.infoBox: PTMC is an equity ETF with a total of 400 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 1.51%, Twilio at 0.82%, Curtiss-Wright at 0.79%, Carpenter Technology at 0.79%, and TechnipFMC at 0.76%.

overview.description: The Pacer Trendpilot US Mid Cap ETF (PTMC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer Trendpilot US Mid Cap index. The fund tracks an index that allocates to a proprietary US mid-cap Index and/or 3-month US T-bills, according to momentum. PTMC was launched on Jun 11, 2015 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer Trendpilot US Mid Cap Index
